signal-green.usageRule: One interactive element per screen. Primary CTAs, sidebar active state, progress fills only.

data-violet.usageRule: Chart fills, data visualizations, form input focus rings. Never CTAs.

alert-coral.usageRule: Destructive actions, error states, For Disposal badges. 12% opacity for badge tints.

void-slate.usageRule: Page background only. Everything sits on top of this.

elevated-surface.usageRule: Dialog footers, table row hover, muted zones, form inputs.

interface-ash.usageRule: All primary body text and interactive element labels.

subdued-text.usageRule: Column headers, field labels, captions, placeholder text, inactive nav icons.

ghost-border.usageRule: All card/input/sidebar borders. Single use value.

namedRules: Signal Green Economy: never more than one Signal Green element on screen simultaneously.
No-Warmth Rule: Signal Green is the only warm value. Every neutral is cool. No warm grays, amber tones, or tan in any surface role.

motion.progressTechnique: transform: scaleX(var(--fill, 0)) on full-width fill element, GPU-composited

button-primary.css: .pill-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; padding: 0 14px; height: 34px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; border: none; transition: .15s; font-family: inherit; } .pill-lime { background: #C6FF00; color: #0F1112; } .pill-lime:hover { background: #B8EF00; }
button-primary.notes: Signal Green fill. Only one per screen. Hover darkens to #B8EF00.

button-ghost.css: .pill-dark { background: #1E2124; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); color: #6B7280; } .pill-dark:hover { color: #E8E8E8; }
button-ghost.notes: Transparent/dark fill variant. Used for secondary actions.

button-destructive.notes: Reserved for delete and irreversible actions only.

badge-usable.css: .badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; }
badge-usable.notes: Low-opacity tint with full-saturation text. Never solid fill.

badge-repair.notes: Amber badge. Only place amber appears in the entire palette.

card.notes: No box-shadow, ever. Depth via tonal layering only. 16px radius, 24px internal padding standard.

input-field.css: .field-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #6B7280; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .05em; margin-bottom: 6px; display: block; } .field-input { width: 100%; background: #252829; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07); border-radius: 10px; padding: 0 14px; height: 42px; color: #fff; font-size: 13px; outline: none; font-family: inherit; } .field-input:focus { border-color: #C6FF00; }
input-field.notes: Focus: border-color Signal Green only. No glow, no shadow. Elevated Surface fill.

select-field.css: .field-select { width: 100%; background: #252829; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07); border-radius: 10px; padding: 0 14px; height: 42px; color: #fff; font-size: 13px; outline: none; font-family: inherit; cursor: pointer; } .field-select:focus { border-color: #C6FF00; } .field-select option { background: #252829; color: #fff; }
select-field.notes: Identical styling to .field-input. Native browser arrow retained.

progress-bar.css: .progress-track { height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .progress-fill { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; transform-origin: left; transform: scaleX(var(--fill, 0)); transition: transform 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .progress-fill { transition-duration: 0.01ms !important; } }
progress-bar.notes: GPU-composited via transform: scaleX. Never animate width. Signal Green fill.

sidebar-item.css: .sb-item { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #6B7280; position: relative; text-decoration: none; transition: background .15s, color .15s; } .sb-item:hover:not(.active) { background: rgba(255,255,255,.06); color: #E8E8E8; } .sb-item.active { background: #C6FF00; color: #0F1112; }
sidebar-item.notes: Active state uses solid Signal Green fill (not tint). Never lime on user avatar.

table-row.html: SN-LP-001MacBook Pro
table-row.css: thead th: font-size 11px, font-weight 600, text-transform uppercase, letter-spacing .05em, color #6B7280. Row hover: background rgba(37,40,41,0.5).
table-row.notes: Identifier cells use IBM Plex Mono. Content cells use IBM Plex Sans. Row borders lighter than card borders.

narrativeMapping.northStar: The Operator's Workbench — methodical, precise, heads-down. Fast, deliberate, never surprising. For IT admins doing monthly reconciliations under fluorescent lights.
antiReferences: SAP/Oracle Fusion ERP (bloated, heavy borders, toolbar overload)
SaaS marketing UIs (gradient cards, hero metrics, sparklines)
Glassmorphism-heavy admin templates (blur effects over structure)
keyDecisions: Dark by function, not trend: contrast without glare for desk-use admin work
Signal Green scarcity: rarity makes it meaningful as the 'next action' signal
IBM Plex Mono for data identifiers: font itself signals 'this is structured data'
Three surface levels, no shadows: tonal depth is precise and maintainable
13px body text: density choice for a desk-use tool, not mobile or marketing
